title: Glitch Text Effect

statement.markdown:
heading: ### Glitch Text Effect
description: Create a text effect that displays a glitchy screen when the user hovers over a paragraph of text.
requirements
1. The glitch effect should be visible on hover.
2. The glitch effect should be applied to a paragraph of text.
3. The glitch effect should be created using CSS and JavaScript.
4. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

constraints: The glitch effect should be displayed within 500ms of hovering over the text.
The glitch effect should persist for at least 2 seconds.
The text should remain readable amidst the glitch effect.

starterCode.html:
<!-- Starter code for Glitch Text Effect -->
tailwindConfig: tailwind.config.js
jsFile: script.js
cssFile: style.css

gradingCriteria.description: The glitch effect is visible on hover.
The glitch effect is applied to a paragraph of text.
The glitch effect is created using CSS and JavaScript.
The glitch effect persists for at least 2 seconds.
